name: Comeback Wednesday: England Belgium and USA Reach the Last 16
angle: The Round of 32 closed on 1 July with a wave of comebacks: Harry Kane's late double rescued England against DR Congo, Belgium roared back from 2-0 down to sink Senegal on the latest goal in World Cup history, and a 10-man United States saw off Bosnia and Herzegovina to reach the last 16.

questions.question: Harry Kane struck twice late on to rescue England in a 2-1 comeback win over which nation in the Round of 32?
Belgium came from 2-0 down to win 3-2 after extra time against which side in the Round of 32?
The United States reached the Round of 16 with a 2-0 win over which nation?
England's win over DR Congo set up a Round of 16 tie with which host nation, to be played at the Azteca?
Who converted the extra-time penalty that completed Belgium's comeback win over Senegal?
Which substitute pulled a goal back late on to ignite Belgium's fightback against Senegal?
Which forward scored the USA's opener against Bosnia before being sent off in the second half?
The USA's victory was their first World Cup win over a European side since beating which nation in the 2002 opener?
Belgium's reward for beating Senegal is a Round of 16 meeting with which nation?
Which manager oversaw England's comeback win over DR Congo?
Youri Tielemans' penalty against Senegal, timed at 124 minutes and 44 seconds, set what World Cup record?

options.A: The latest goal ever scored in a World Cup match
options.B: The fastest penalty in a World Cup match
options.C: The first successful extra-time penalty in a shootout
options.D: The latest red card in a World Cup match

questions.question: DR Congo stunned England with a seventh-minute opener in Atlanta. Which forward scored it?
Senegal led Belgium 2-0 through Habib Diarra and which winger before the collapse?
Kane's double against DR Congo took his tally for this World Cup to how many goals, keeping him in the Golden Boot race?
Malik Tillman's strike against Bosnia was the USA's first World Cup goal direct from a free kick since which player scored against Switzerland in 1994?

https://www.olympics.com/en/news/fifa-world-cup2026-harry-kane-england-all-time-top-scorer (Kane England's all-time leading World Cup scorer; five for the tournament, in Golden Boot race)

https://www.thescore.com/news/3561408/belgium-uses-125-th-minute-penalty-to-seal-epic-comeback-win-vs-senegal (Belgium 125th-minute penalty comeback from 2-0 down in Seattle)
